label: Movement Intensity – Next Steps
description: Maps movement intensity results into concrete follow-up actions, including household sessions (cleaning, garden, animal care) and structured workout-style movement blocks that can be turned into SessionRunner sessions.

below.label: Below Movement Target
below.description: User is well below guideline-equivalent minutes. Focus on simple, approachable movement wins that can be layered into household tasks and short walks.

recommendedFlows.label: Light Household Movement Stack
recommendedFlows.description: Promote light-intensity movement through short, easy household tasks and walk blocks.

recommendedFlows.label: Short Walk Blocks
recommendedFlows.description: Suggest multiple 10–15 minute walks per day as the primary strategy to close the movement gap.

on-track.label: On-Track Movement
on-track.description: User is near guideline-equivalent minutes. Focus on maintaining a sustainable pattern using household movement and a few moderate sessions.

recommendedFlows.label: Balanced Household + Moderate Sessions
recommendedFlows.description: Blend household chores, walks, and a few moderate-intensity blocks to maintain current progress.

above.label: Above Movement Target
above.description: User is significantly above guideline-equivalent minutes. Emphasize recovery, deload weeks, and technique-focused or mobility sessions.

recommendedFlows.label: Recovery & Mobility Focus
recommendedFlows.description: Shift emphasis toward mobility, stretching, and low-intensity household tasks while monitoring energy and sleep.

light.label: Light Movement
light.description: Activities that keep the user moving without major breathlessness. Ideal for warm-ups, active recovery, and gentle ramp-up from sedentary patterns.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: 20-min Room Reset & Tidy
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Surface wipe-down, light decluttering, and a quick sweep or vacuum of a single room.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: Garden Walk & Bed Check
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Stroll the garden, check moisture, pull a few easy weeds, and observe plant health.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: Pantry & Freezer Walkthrough
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Walk your storehouse, scan for items to rotate, and note what needs to be used soon.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: 10–20 min Easy Walk
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Gentle walk where the user can carry a full conversation without gasping.

moderate.label: Moderate Movement
moderate.description: Movement that raises heart rate and breathing but still allows short sentences. Great for strengthening the heart and supporting weight management.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: Whole-Floor Sweep & Mop
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Continuous sweeping and mopping at a brisk but safe pace for 20–30 minutes.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: Garden Bed Prep & Mulching
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Raking, lifting light bags, and spreading mulch steadily for 20–30 minutes.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: Animal Care Circuit
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Feeding, water bucket carries, pen cleaning, and short pasture checks.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: 30-min Mixed Moderate Block
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Intervals of brisk walking, step-ups, or low-impact aerobics.

vigorous.label: Vigorous Movement
vigorous.description: Hard breathing while still under control. Should be used carefully and adjusted if recovery flags or risk indicators are present.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: 20-min Vigorous Intervals
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Short bursts of vigorous effort (stairs, high-step marches, fast walking up hills) with equal or longer recovery periods.

suggestedSessionExamples.title: Home Cardio Circuit
suggestedSessionExamples.notes: Rotating exercises like marching in place, step-ups, and shadow boxing tailored to the user’s joints and space.
